metadata.title:
MAYOR WANTS GRADE


SEPARATION PROMISE

VIII urge Council to Insert Clause In All Future


Franchises.

pages.raw_text:
railroads agree in any future fran
chise that they will separate the
grades any time the city demands
it,


This city has had in the past
and is now having trouble with the
Northern Pacific railroad over
grade separation. The line runs
through the city, across streets not
the least protected. Many people
have, been killed by the speed of its
trains. street crossings have been
blocked and business hindered in
many ways on account of lack of
grade separation. There seems to
be 20 way to force this company
into it, either, as there is no such
provision in their franchise.
